title: Our Qualifications
intro: Explore our comprehensive range of professionally recognised qualifications across First Aid, Business, Management, and Health & Social Care.

First Aid.headline: Training programs offer valuable opportunities to gain specialised skills and knowledge while earning internationally recognised qualifications.
First Aid.description: Irrespective of whether an individual is taking their first steps into the world of employment or well established in their role, first aid training programs serve as an excellent opportunity to learn life-saving knowledge and skills giving you the opportunity to protect those around you.
First Aid.progressionTitle: What progression paths you can choose:

Business.headline: Business qualifications equip you with the strategic thinking and operational expertise needed to excel in today's competitive marketplace.
Business.description: Whether you are starting your career in business or looking to progress into senior management, our business programmes provide the knowledge and practical skills required to lead teams, manage projects, and drive organisational success.
Business.progressionTitle: What progression paths you can choose:

Management.headline: Management qualifications develop your leadership capabilities, enabling you to inspire teams and deliver results at the highest level.
Management.description: Our management programmes are designed for aspiring and experienced leaders who want to enhance their strategic decision-making, people management, and organisational development skills to advance into senior leadership roles.
Management.progressionTitle: What progression paths you can choose:

Care.headline: Health and Social Care qualifications prepare you for a rewarding career supporting individuals and communities in need.
Care.description: From foundational diplomas to advanced healthcare management, our care programmes equip you with the knowledge, compassion, and professional competence to make a meaningful difference in people's lives.
Care.progressionTitle: What progression paths you can choose:

qualifications.title: Paediatric First Aid Training (Level 3)
qualifications.description: A comprehensive paediatric first aid course covering emergency procedures for infants and children, suitable for childcare professionals and parents.

qualifications.title: First Aid at Work Course (Level 3)
qualifications.description: An HSE-approved first aid at work course providing comprehensive training in workplace first aid procedures and emergency response.

qualifications.title: Basic Life Support Training Course
qualifications.description: Essential life-saving skills including CPR, use of an AED, and management of choking for adults, children, and infants.

qualifications.title: Emergency First Aid at Work Course (Level 3)
qualifications.description: A one-day emergency first aid course designed for low-risk workplaces, covering essential first aid skills and emergency procedures.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 7 Diploma in Strategic Management and Leadership
qualifications.description: This qualification is designed for managers and leaders who have the authority and inspiration to translate organisational strategy into effective operational performance.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 6 Diploma in Business Management
qualifications.description: Develop advanced business management skills and prepare for senior management roles or further study at postgraduate level.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 5 Extended Diploma in Business Management
qualifications.description: Build a strong foundation in business management principles and practices for mid-level management careers.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 5 Diploma in Health and Social Care Management
qualifications.description: Gain specialist knowledge in health and social care management to lead teams and services effectively.

qualifications.title: QUALIFI Level 3 Diploma in Health and Social Care
qualifications.description: An entry-level qualification providing foundational knowledge in health and social care practice.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 4 Diploma in Business Management
qualifications.description: Start your journey in business management with this comprehensive Level 4 qualification.

qualifications.title: QUALIFI Level 7 Diploma in Strategic Management and Leadership
qualifications.description: An advanced qualification for senior professionals looking to enhance their strategic leadership capabilities.

qualifications.title: OTHM Level 7 Diploma in Healthcare Management
qualifications.description: A specialist qualification for healthcare professionals aspiring to senior management positions.

meta.title: Qualifications – The Prime College
meta.description: Browse our professional qualifications in First Aid, Business, Management, and Health & Social Care.
